mapper.insert: INSERT INTO idempotency_key ( idempotency_key, client_id, request_hash, idempotency_status, first_response_snap, retry_count, first_received_at, last_received_at, expires_at, first_registrant_id, last_modifier_id ) VALUES ( #{idempotencyKey}, #{clientId}, #{requestHash}, #{idempotencyStatus}, #{firstResponseSnap}::jsonb, #{retryCount}, #{firstReceivedAt}, #{lastReceivedAt}, #{expiresAt}, #{firstRegistrantId}, #{lastModifierId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE idempotency_key SET idempotency_status = #{idempotencyStatus}, first_response_snap = #{firstResponseSnap}::jsonb, last_modified_at = now() WHERE idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey}
